phases.name: Fix Immersion Breakers
phases.rationale: Zero-audio screens and weak conceit moments destroy the TV-show illusion. intro-instructions has dead air that makes respondents question if the app is broken. These must be fixed first to maintain emotional engagement.

tasks.description: Add Steve VO to intro-instructions screen to eliminate dead air
tasks.implementation: 1. Generate TTS via ElevenLabs: 'All right player, here's how this works. Seven quick TV segments about Nikhil. Type whatever comes to mind.' 2. Update screens.ts intro-instructions: set audio to '/vo/00a-intro-instructions.mp3', remove duration:0.1 hack, add captions array with the VO text.

tasks.description: Merge commercial-why into commercial-break to eliminate fatigue valley
tasks.implementation: 1. Extend sponsor VO to include 'And why?' follow-up. 2. Change commercial-break UI from 'short-text' to 'two-text' with labels ['Brand/Vibe/Product', 'Why it fits']. 3. Remove commercial-why screen entirely from screens array. 4. Update test assertions for new screen count.

tasks.description: Add Steve reaction audio to shark-reason based on invest/pass choice
tasks.implementation: 1. Generate two TTS clips: 'You're in! Bold move. Now tell me why.' and 'You're out! Smart or scared? Tell me why.' 2. Add conditional audio selection in ScreenPlayer based on previous answer (shark-invest choice stored in survey state). 3. Update screens.ts shark-reason with dynamic audio reference.

tasks.description: Verify post-credits stinger VO exists and plays correctly
tasks.implementation: 1. Check if 11-stinger.mp3 exists and has content. 2. If missing, generate TTS for the Jeff/Steve computer gag. 3. Verify captions match audio timing.

phases.name: Establish Segment Visual Identity
phases.rationale: All shows currently use the same yellow accent color. Without visual distinction, the TV-show conceit feels like a gimmick rather than an immersive experience. Segment theming reinforces the narrative arc.

tasks.description: Create CSS custom properties for segment-specific accent colors
tasks.implementation: Add to :root: --segment-intro: #22c55e (green), --segment-feud: #3b82f6 (blue), --segment-bachelor: #e11d48 (rose), --segment-shark: #06b6d4 (cyan), --segment-maury: #a855f7 (purple), --segment-survivor: #d97706 (amber), --segment-commercial: #eab308 (yellow), --segment-credits: #71717a (zinc).

tasks.description: Replace hardcoded spotlight colors with token references
tasks.implementation: 1. Create getSegmentToken(screenId) utility that returns the token name. 2. Update getSpotlightGradient to use CSS variable references via var(--segment-*). 3. Add segment token as data attribute on section for downstream component use.

tasks.description: Update QuestionPrompt border to use segment accent instead of hardcoded amber
tasks.implementation: 1. Accept segmentId prop. 2. Map segmentId to --segment-* token. 3. Replace border-amber-500 with dynamic border color using style={{ borderColor: 'var(--segment-feud)' }} pattern or Tailwind arbitrary value.

tasks.description: Pass segment accent to UI input components for themed buttons and focus rings
tasks.implementation: 1. Add accent?: string prop to UIInputProps. 2. Thread accent through to PrimaryButton and focus states. 3. For MVP, pass accent via CSS variable on wrapper div: style={{ '--ui-accent': 'var(--segment-feud)' }}.

phases.name: Harmonize Animation Timing
phases.rationale: Inconsistent durations (0.3s, 0.35s, 0.4s, 0.5s) create subtle jarring moments. A defined scale makes motion feel intentional and polished.

tasks.description: Define canonical duration scale in animations.ts
tasks.implementation: Add exported constants: DURATION_MICRO = 0.15, DURATION_FAST = 0.25, DURATION_STANDARD = 0.35, DURATION_SLOW = 0.5, DURATION_DRAMATIC = 0.8. Document scale in comment block.

tasks.description: Align TelevisionFrame zoom duration with screen transitions
tasks.implementation: 1. Import DURATION_DRAMATIC from animations.ts. 2. Replace hardcoded 1.2s with DURATION_DRAMATIC (0.8s) for tighter feel, or document why 1.2s is intentional deviation.

tasks.description: Replace inline transitions with shared presets in RelationshipPicker
tasks.implementation: 1. Import interactiveScale and duration constants. 2. Replace transition-all duration-300 with Framer Motion variants using interactiveScale. 3. Use DURATION_STANDARD for transition prop.

tasks.description: Document uiRevealAt timing rationale for each screen
tasks.implementation: Add inline comments explaining timing: 0s = no audio, 1-2s = short intro, 3-4s = standard, 5-6s = dramatic buildup. Group screens by timing pattern to verify consistency.

phases.name: Consolidate Design Tokens
phases.rationale: Scattered inline styles for buttons, spacing, and colors make the codebase harder to maintain and create subtle visual inconsistencies.

tasks.description: Define spacing scale and replace ad-hoc gap values
tasks.implementation: 1. Document spacing scale: space-2 (8px), space-3 (12px), space-4 (16px), space-6 (24px). 2. Audit space-y-3, space-y-4, gap-2, gap-3, gap-4 usage. 3. Standardize on space-4 for form groups, space-3 for tight groups.

tasks.description: Standardize border radius usage
tasks.implementation: Define scale: rounded-md (buttons, inputs), rounded-lg (cards, panels), rounded-xl (modals, overlays), rounded-full (pills, chips). Replace inconsistent rounded-2xl with rounded-xl.

tasks.description: Standardize error text color to single token
tasks.implementation: 1. Use text-error token (maps to text-red-500 in globals.css). 2. Replace all instances of text-red-400 and text-red-500 with text-error. 3. Verify error color has sufficient contrast ratio.

tasks.description: Standardize input placeholder colors
tasks.implementation: Standardize on placeholder-muted token (maps to placeholder-zinc-500). Replace placeholder-zinc-400 and placeholder-zinc-600 with consistent token.

phases.name: Final Polish Pass
phases.rationale: Minor inconsistencies that don't break immersion but improve overall fit and finish.

tasks.description: Ensure all primary buttons use PrimaryButton primitive
tasks.implementation: Audit inline button styles in StartButton, ContinueButton, RelationshipPicker. Replace with PrimaryButton/SecondaryButton primitives or document exceptions.

tasks.description: Update MadLib inline input to use design tokens
tasks.implementation: Replace hardcoded border-yellow-500, text-yellow-300 with segment-aware accent tokens. Use --ui-accent CSS variable pattern.

tasks.description: Extract ThreeText physical frame styling to reusable pattern
tasks.implementation: The Feud board styling is intentionally unique. Document as segment-specific exception. Consider extracting FeudInput component if reused.

resolutionPlan.riskAssessment: Key risks: (1) TTS generation quality for new VO lines - mitigate with human recording fallback. (2) Conditional audio for shark-reason requires survey state threading - may need architecture discussion. (3) Screen count change from merging commercial screens will break any hardcoded indices - run test suite after. (4) CSS variable approach for segment theming may not work with Tailwind JIT - test in dev before committing.
resolutionPlan.totalEstimatedEffort: Phase 1: 2-3 days (audio generation + conditional logic). Phase 2: 1 day. Phase 3: 0.5 day. Phase 4: 0.5 day. Phase 5: 0.5 day. Total: 4-5 days.
